# INTERSOFTI

> Technology solutions for connectivity, AI edge computing, secure mobile devices, and digital payments.

INTERSOFTI builds and distributes products that help people and businesses stay connected and secure. The site offers prepaid international eSIM data plans, the IronWatch AI Box edge-computing device, the Ghostcode S10 privacy-focused smartphone, a crypto-backed Visa card, and supporting services such as order tracking, eSIM status checks, and activation help.

## Pages

- [Home](/): INTERSOFTI landing page with product highlights and company overview.
- [eSIM Store](/eSIM): Browse and buy prepaid international eSIM data plans by region or country.
- [eSIM Status](/esim-status): Check balance, usage, and recharge an existing eSIM by ICCID.
- [IronWatch AI Box](/box_ai): Edge AI hardware powered by Rockchip RK3588 with technical specifications.
- [AI Solutions](/box_ai/solutions): Sector-specific intelligent solutions for industry, retail, security, healthcare, and more.
- [Ghostcode S10](/ghostcode-s10): Secure smartphone focused on privacy and encrypted communications.
- [Ghostcode Messenger](/ghostcode-s10/messenger): Encrypted messaging service for the Ghostcode S10 ecosystem.
- [Ghostcode Token](/ghostcode-s10/token): Token and access details for the Ghostcode platform.
- [Ghostcode S10 Product](/ghostcode-s10-product): Product details and purchase options for the Ghostcode S10.
- [Crypto Visa Card](/crypto-card-firswe-visa): Crypto-to-fiat Visa card information and application.
- [Activation](/activation): Device and service activation instructions.
- [Order Tracking](/order-tracking): Track physical and eSIM orders by order number.
- [Help Center](/help): Support articles and frequently asked questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form and company information.
- [Blog](/blog/1): Articles and updates from INTERSOFTI.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms and conditions for using the site and services.
- [Checkout Return](/checkout/return): Post-payment confirmation and order summary page.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Email preference and unsubscribe management.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs for search engines and crawlers.
